cars.name: Toyota Prado TX
cars.description: Command the road with quiet authority. The Prado TX blends luxury with unstoppable durability. Built for executives who don’t explain success — they demonstrate it.

cars.name: Mercedes-Benz C300
cars.description: Refined aggression. Precision engineering. The C300 AMG Line isn’t transportation — it’s a statement that you have arrived and you are not negotiating your standards.

cars.name: BMW X5
cars.description: Dominance meets intelligence. The BMW X5 delivers power that obeys you instantly. For those who understand that control is the ultimate luxury.

cars.name: Mazda CX-5
cars.description: Elegance without apology. The CX-5 offers refined comfort wrapped in bold design. It whispers class while others scream for attention.

cars.name: Subaru Forester
cars.description: Built for thinkers. Reliable. Tactical. Efficient. The Forester gives you long-term advantage — the kind that smart people choose.

cars.name: Range Rover Sport
cars.description: Luxury engineered for power players. The Range Rover Sport doesn’t follow roads — it defines them. Presence is power.

cars.name: Audi Q7
cars.description: Precision. Confidence. Silence. The Audi Q7 gives you authority without noise — and power without drama.

cars.name: Volkswagen Tiguan
cars.description: Smart choice. Strategic investment. The Tiguan balances performance and economy for individuals who think three moves ahead.

cars.name: Nissan X-Trail
cars.description: Versatility redefined. The X-Trail adapts to your ambition. Practical yet powerful — the perfect weapon for daily conquest.

cars.name: Toyota Land Cruiser V8
cars.description: Unquestioned authority. The Land Cruiser V8 is not bought — it is claimed. Built for leaders who understand permanence and power.
